title: bridelia atroviridis
intro: Bridelia atroviridis, also known as the ironwort or mangrove water, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bridelia atroviridis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Bridelia atroviridis can be made into a tea, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
